steps.title: Identify doubling condition
steps.content: We want f(t+T) = 2 f(t). Substitute the expression: $$72000·2^{(t+T)/830} = 2·72000·2^{t/830}$$. Cancel 72000 and divide both sides by $2^{t/830}$: $$2^{(t+T)/830} = 2·2^{t/830} = 2^{1 + t/830}$$. Equate exponents: $$\frac{t+T}{830} = 1 + \frac{t}{830}$$.

steps.title: Solve for T
steps.content: Subtract $\frac{t}{830}$ from both sides: $$\frac{T}{830} = 1$$. Multiply by 830: $$T = 830$$ minutes. That confirms B is correct.
